---
name: code-review-icons
description: Use when reviewing new or changed icons, icon buttons, character-based icons, inline SVGs, or icon accessibility
---

# Icons Code Review Expert

Review only icon usage concerns.

## Review Focus

- Always use the project's icon library.
- Never create icons from text characters such as `+`, `×`, or `▶`.
- Do not use hand-rolled inline SVGs when the icon library has an appropriate equivalent.
- Check icon button accessible names, decorative icon hiding, sizing, stroke consistency, and alignment with shared UI primitives.

## Output

Return `No findings in scope.` or findings with severity, file/line, evidence, icon consistency/accessibility risk, and a concrete fix.
